message:
Add TUI entry point and main application component

Implement the main entry point for the phage-explorer terminal UI
and the root App component that orchestrates all user interactions.

Entry Point (packages/tui/src/index.tsx):
- Checks for phage.db existence before starting
- Initializes BunSqliteRepository for database access
- Renders App component with Ink's render() function
- Configures patchConsole: false to prevent flickering from
  console output interception
- Handles graceful cleanup on exit

Main App Component (packages/tui/src/components/App.tsx):
- Full-screen layout with responsive dimensions
- Sidebar (32 chars): PhageList + 3D Model view
- Main area: SequenceGrid with color-coded sequences
- Bottom: GeneMap showing gene positions
- Footer: Key hints and status information

Keyboard Controls:
- Arrow keys: Navigate phages (up/down) and scroll sequence (left/right)
- PgUp/PgDn: Fast scroll through sequence
- Home/End: Jump to sequence start/end (via escape sequence parsing)
- N/C/Space: Toggle DNA/Amino Acid view
- F: Cycle reading frame (1, 2, 3)
- T: Cycle color theme
- D: Toggle diff mode
- M: Toggle 3D model display
- P: Pause/resume 3D model animation
- S or /: Open search overlay
- K: Show amino acid key legend
- ?: Show help overlay
- Q: Quit

Mouse Support:
- Enables SGR mouse mode (1000/1006/1003) for position tracking
- Tracks mouse position over sequence grid
- In amino acid view, detects which amino acid is under cursor
- Uses ref-based tracking to avoid redundant state updates
- Properly disables mouse mode on cleanup

State Management:
- Uses Zustand store for all application state
- Connects to repository for phage data loading
- Handles terminal resize events
- Manages overlay states (help, search, amino acid key)

Package Configuration:
- Updates packages/tui/package.json with author field
